headline: Ahead of Intuit (INTU) Q3 Earnings: Get Ready With Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
summary: Besides Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates for Intuit (INTU), review projections for some of its key metrics to gain a deeper understanding of how the company might have fared during the quarter ended April 2026.

headline: Intuit (INTU) Valuation Check After A Year Of Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent share performance and what it might signal Intuit (INTU) has seen mixed share performance recently, with the stock up 1.8% over the past day and about 3.1% over the past month, but down roughly 5.3% over the past 3 months. Over longer periods, returns have been weaker, with the stock down about 40% year to date and roughly 42% over the past year. The 3 year and 5 year total returns also show double digit declines.
